name: Draft-only contract review
pattern: Redline -> citation check -> risk rating -> human lawyer
scenario: A vendor MSA includes broad indemnity and unilateral renewal language that conflicts with the playbook.
workflow_steps: Compare clauses against the contract playbook.
Verify every cited authority or policy reference.
Score residual legal and commercial risk per clause.
Route draft redline and memo for licensed human review.
policy_gates: Output is draft-only and is never presented as legal advice.
Licensed human review is required before external use.

input_contract.description: Concrete scenario input for this pattern example.
